title: Expansion planner: select next-cycle breadth + depth targets from coverage gaps, with per-target budget
context: To broaden coverage cycle over cycle, ATLTUAE needs a planner that reads the coverage ledger and proposes the next cycle's work without ever proposing to conclude. This M2 task selects breadth (new nodes) and depth (under-covered nodes) targets, each with an estimated budget that fits within the per-cycle cap, keeping the frontier explicit and non-empty.
objective: Implement the expansion planner that reads the coverage ledger and proposes next-cycle breadth (new nodes) and depth (under-covered nodes) targets, each with an estimated per-target budget that fits within the per-cycle cap, never proposing to conclude.
acceptanceCriteria: Reads the coverage ledger and proposes next-cycle breadth (new nodes) + depth (under-covered nodes) targets, each with an estimated budget that fits within the per-cycle cap
Never proposes concluding; the frontier remains explicit and non-empty
Proposed targets are presented in a reviewable form for the human checkpoint to approve/modify
